metadata.title: SousChef AI
metadata.description: Upload a photo of your ingredients and get a personalized AI-generated recipe in seconds.

hero.descriptionPart1: Snap a photo of your fridge or pantry.
hero.descriptionPart2: and crafts a personalized recipe — in seconds.
hero.disclaimer: No credit card required · Free to use

howItWorks.title: From fridge to plate in 4 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No meal planning needed. Just a photo.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Point your camera at your fridge, pantry, or counter. Anything visible counts.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI lists what it sees. Remove mistakes, add what's missing — you stay in control.
howItWorks.step3Desc: A real, cookable recipe is generated using only what you confirmed.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Generate a stunning AI photo of the finished dish to spark inspiration.

whyUseIt.title: Smart cooking, zero waste
whyUseIt.subtitle: Built for real kitchens, real ingredients, real people.
whyUseIt.feature1Desc: No grocery runs. No wasted ingredients. Just open your fridge and start.
whyUseIt.feature2Desc: Turn forgotten ingredients into a full meal before they go bad.
whyUseIt.feature3Desc: From photo to plated recipe in under a minute.

cta.title: Ready to cook something amazing?
cta.subtitle: Join home cooks who waste less and eat better.

ingredientEditor.title: Confirm your ingredients
ingredientEditor.subtitle: Remove anything that doesn't belong or add what's missing
ingredientEditor.empty: No ingredients yet. Add some below.
